Monkey Hide Greaves  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
Charges: 3
AC: 15
STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +30 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +5 SV MAGIC: +5
Effect: Ring of Misty (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 0.1 Size: MEDIUM
Class: MNK
Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Monkey Hide Greaves
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
Charges: 3
AC: 15
STA: +15 AGI: +15 HP: +30 ENDUR: +20
SV DISEASE: +5 SV MAGIC: +5
Effect: Ring of Misty (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 0.1 Size: MEDIUM
Class: MNK
Race: HUM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Monk
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Srophkor
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 04:20:51
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Gift Box
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Monkey Hide Greaves (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Monkey Hide Greaves

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Mischief 2.0


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
instant
QuoteReply
# Dec 05 2004 at 11:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781875416
162 posts
casting time is instant, no clue about recharging or ...really how to recharge anything
▲ Page top
Nice
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2002 at 10:38 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592255208037
32 posts
Very nice, just run over to rivervale and there is ALWAYS a 40+ druid there that is willing to port somewhere, Even as Iksar it isnt that hard to get in. Very handy.
▲ Page top
this rocks
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2001 at 2:41 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763858409
34 posts
man these pants and thurg gate potions..monkey can get around! add in sow potions, dang who needs a druid.
▲ Page top
this rocks
QuoteReply
# Nov 20 2001 at 2:40 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763858409
34 posts
▲ Page top
the graphic
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2001 at 2:43 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Look like kael quest legs =)
▲ Page top
I'll sure take them
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 3:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764013967
1 post
I am kinda stunned by these posts. As a human monk I personally find Misty as the best zone to land in if i need supplies or a bank. To have a pair of pants that will get me to one of the most convenient bank zones in the game all by myself is very cool. That and the stats kick butt.
▲ Page top
RE: I'll sure take them
QuoteReply
# Nov 15 2001 at 12:33 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592341837046
View User Forum
Scholar
582 posts
Certainly, the stats are excellent, but the effect is charges-based... so it's of somewhat limited use except as a getaway item. For that, you should probably be working up your Pottery for a Thurgadin Gate Potion. :-)
▲ Page top
Halflings
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 10:50 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Because it is next to rivervale. Bristlebane...halflings...understand now?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 17 2001 at 8:07 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what would monks need with a port to misty. lol it would be funny if they made this a proc... watch all the moks in the groups besides you monks mysteriously disapear )
RE: okay...that is gay
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2001 at 2:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249461149
62 posts
Well, look at it this way; if you're an Iksar and you just got your tail handed to you by some nasty mob and you had to use this... Wouldn't you feel like punching a halfling right about then?
▲ Page top
RE: okay...that is gay
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 8:55 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Eh, it'd be cool if you got left behind in an evac, I guess.
▲ Page top
RE: okay...that is gay
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2001 at 9:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752043081
82 posts
Iksar Monks love to spend time there ) I think that's a super effect. But on a serious note it is an escape besides FD, dont know cast time, and your at a port spot where a druid can pick you up easy enough. Still a strange spot, very mischievous eh.
▲ Page top
RE: okay...that is gay
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 5:28 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
Mischievous? Maybe. The only thing I think I would use the effect for is if I LD'd on a planes raid, and was all alone when I got back on. Nice way to get out of places that other wise have no exit.
▲ Page top
